description: Supplier master data. Name column is supplier_name, not name.

chunks.text:
TABLE: suppliers

DESCRIPTION: Supplier master data. Name column is supplier_name, not name.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: suppliers, vendors, manufacturers, distributors, supplier list, vendor list

PRIMARY_KEY: supplier_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: supplier_id, supplier_name, contact_person, email, phone, address, city, state, country, payment_terms, rating, created_at

USE_CASES: Supplier lookup, supplier performance, vendor contact, supplier rating
